000.Name: Victor, the Underworld
000.* Attributes: If this is exalted, draw cards you affect with unveil.
000.Flavor Text: Factions within factions, pawns among pawns…

002.Name: Major De la Croix
002.Flavor Text: The pace is different in these back waters.

003.Name: Minister Akamu
003.Flavor Text: His people call him the Charismatic Fist.

005.Name: Sawyer, the Resurgent
005.Flavor Text: What hasn't killed him has strengthened his resolve.

006.Name: Lady Auren Dias
006.Flavor Text: I'm confident you'll see things my way.

007.Name: Ryker, Nuclear Overlord
007.* Attributes: You can pay WMD generic resource costs using half as many, rounded up. If you do, lose 1 morale.
007.Flavor Text: I've already won the arms race...

008.Name: High Justice Bancroft
008.* Attributes: You can pay non-soldier force generic resource costs (GENERIC) using 1 less.
008.Flavor Text: She takes the mantle with a solemn heart.

009.Name: General J. Holt
009.Flavor Text: War is won on the back of logistics.

010.Name: Kyodo Lee, Ronin
010.Flavor Text: I have broken from my father's draconian ideals.

011.Name: Viceroy Demidov
011.Flavor Text: The gauntleted right hand of Trionvice.

012.Name: VL II Energy Center
012.Flavor Text: Our battery technology is shockingly advanced.

013.Name: Ironhead Enclave
013.Flavor Text: Forging the backbone of the nation.

014.Name: North Oakworth
014.Attributes: MORALE(+1), HEALTH(+10 To each blocking force in your legion)
014.Flavor Text: They thought we'd roll over...they were wrong.

015.Name: Solarin Grove
015.Flavor Text: Clean energy, in pursuit of a clear future.

016.Name: Blackearth Mine
016.Flavor Text: We'll extract it at any cost!

017.Name: Moreau Swamp
017.Flavor Text: The swamp provides, if you know where to look...

018.Name: Scrap Yard S3-1035
018.* Attributes: Produce 2 extra resources if you have > 4 non-soldier forces in your discard.
018.Flavor Text: Strip it down and ship it out!

019.Name: Warehouse Precinct
019.* Attributes: You may attach unspent resources to this; enemies can't specify them.

022.Name: Petrochemical Works
022.* Attributes: Find a specific card in your arsenal and place it on top after you shuffle your arsenal if this produces hollow.
022.Flavor Text: Anything raw or crude, we'll refine it.

023.Name: Bio Incineration Facilities
023.Flavor Text: Ashes to ashes, dust to fertilizer...

025.Name: Hart Natural Gas Center
025.* Attributes: If eliminated, your territories each take 50 damage.

026.Name: Sola Island Markets
026.* Attributes: Draw a card if this produces generic.
026.Flavor Text: You'd be surprised what could turn up.

027.Name: Nation's Capital
027.Flavor Text: From here, ripples of power spread...

028.Name: Abandoned Wasteland
028.* Attributes: Forces that attack this can't return on their next turn.

029.Name: Clementine Mire
029.Flavor Text: Black gold from the black depths.

030.Name: Specialist Sabian Hunter
030.Flavor Text: I'll get in and shut them down.

031.Name: Koloa Plantation
031.Flavor Text: Koloa bananas, known the world over.

032.Name: White Rock Energy
032.Flavor Text: From primary energy straight to the nation's grid.

033.Name: Weapons District
033.Flavor Text: If you've got a taste for destruction, we'll satisfy it.

034.Name: International Pipelines
034.Flavor Text: From Dryton, to all points on the map.

035.Name: Brotherland Fields
035.Flavor Text: A hidden bounty known only to the initiated.

036.Name: Aiko Kita, the Swift
036.* Attributes: Put this with your legion if it's in your opening hand.

037.Name: Bella, Trusted Strategist
037.* Attributes: Each battle, a specific force in your legion with a turn cost <2 takes no damage.
037.Flavor Text: It's time for a tactical shift.

038.Name: Omar Park
038.Flavor Text: You'd be surprised what people forget to lock up.

039.Name: Sylvia Keene
039.* Attributes: If you trigger unveil, draw a card.
039.Flavor Text: You work for her, you just don't know it yet.

040.Name: Agent Ryan Silver
040.Flavor Text: Let me show you things from a different angle.

042.Name: Loyalty Officer Kahue
042.* Attributes: Enemies can't take control of forces in your legion.

043.Name: Master Sergeant Rockwell
043.* Attributes: Soldier forces in your legion return after each battle.
043.Flavor Text: He trains them to be the best of the best.

045.Name: Dakota Clark, Guardian
045.Flavor Text: I've got a surprise for those low-flyers.

048.Name: Private Thomas Kasper
048.Flavor Text: Trash to treasure, as they say...

049.Name: Lead Junker Pegg
049.Attributes: ACCESS(2), DEPLOY(1, SALVAGE, salvage intel), TERRITORIAL

050.Name: Stone
050.* Attributes: Buildings in your legion aren't affected by demo.
050.Flavor Text: Trained to find explosives; fiercely loyal.

051.Name: Agent Andrej Zima
051.* Attributes: Non-soldier forces you play cost 1 more of any resource. Only 1 instance of this per legion.

056.Name: Butcher
056.Flavor Text: If you see his eyes, it's too late...

057.Name: Sergeant Sigwalt Klein
057.Flavor Text: He leaves bodies in his wake...

059.Name: Levi Vipul, Ex-Supplier
059.Flavor Text: Is he okay? What's he doing?

060.Name: Gage
060.Flavor Text: Inciting violence is what I do best.

061.Name: Rayaan, the Insider
061.Flavor Text: I'm in the business of transparency.

063.Name: Lucas Campbell, Farmer
063.* Attributes: Can't produce if a non-clear weather is in the war zone.
063.Flavor Text: I'm a simple man, living a simple life.

067.Name: Dimitrovtek-11 Mech
067.Flavor Text: All it leaves behind is fire and pain.

068.Name: Goliath 62D
068.Flavor Text: The Goliath moves, the ground quakes...

069.Name: Dark Bear - 2XP
069.Flavor Text: It claws through enemies with ease.

070.Name: R-19 Synth
070.* Attributes: Put 5 drone forces from your legion in your hand. If you do, find a specific mech force in your arsenal and put it with your legion; it's ready. You can't play drone forces this turn.

071.Name: X-56 Aftermath
071.Flavor Text: Crossing paths with it has dire consequences.

074.Name: Centurion MK7
074.* Attributes: Soldier and army forces in your legion are not affected by weather.
074.Flavor Text: They can burn all the bridges they want.

075.Name: M65 Minesweeper
075.* Attributes: Eliminate all enemy buildings with anti-ground and an attack value <20.

076.Name: AG Wolverine
076.Flavor Text: An aggressive tank built for the front line.

077.Name: Lockdown K1
077.Flavor Text: Another shell! Keep them pinned down!

079.Name: Rhino 5
079.Flavor Text: It's best to stay out of its way.

083.Name: RCG Charleston
083.* Attributes: Excess damage from cruiser and destroyer navy forces in your legion gets through blockers.

085.Name: GR Giga Crawler
085.Attributes: ATTACK(30, artillery forces), ARMORED, ARTILLERY, BLITZ

089.Name: G-21 Solomon
089.Attributes: ATTACK(20, artillery forces), SPENT(3), ARTILLERY, OUT_OF_RANGE

092.Name: A96 Knight Hunter
092.* Attributes: Cards that block this lose anti-air this turn.

095.Name: DH Wildcat
095.Flavor Text: Drones are online. Uploading targeting data.

097.Name: RH Mirage
097.Flavor Text: It appeared out of nowhere, and was gone just as fast...

100.Name: Sky Viper V
100.Flavor Text: Expensive equipment, and worth every penny.

102.Name: Condor 891X
102.Flavor Text: On approach to the landing zone!

108.Name: GX-J Eagle II
108.Flavor Text: The newest line of GX fighters.

109.Name: 55 Corvus
109.Flavor Text: The fastest rate of fire among our wingman drones.

111.Name: T1 Mosquito
111.* Attributes: Can't block. If this loses stealth, it's eliminated.
111.Flavor Text: Like a fly on the wall...

112.Name: Gray Owl XR
112.Flavor Text: This little assistant can handle a lot.

113.Name: T-2 Cormorant
113.Flavor Text: Able to slip past enemy defenses.

114.Name: VX Cerberus
114.Attributes: ARMORED, STEALTH, ATTACH(3, WINGMAN, wingman forces)
114.Flavor Text: A monster with several sets of sharp teeth.

115.Name: HX Odin
115.Flavor Text: The father of all amphibious assault craft.

116.Name: 0X-P Glacier
116.Flavor Text: A new tide has rolled in.

117.Name: Black Raider II
117.Flavor Text: Get aboard, take anything useful, and then sink 'em.

119.Name: GR Night Phantom
119.Flavor Text: What did you see? We're not sure, sir...

120.Name: EE-L
120.Flavor Text: Capable of devastating hit and run operations.

121.Name: Hoffmann LR-4
121.* Attributes: A specific enemy shows you their hand; discard a navy force from it.
121.Flavor Text: Detects and dispatches hostiles with ease.

122.Name: D948-x1
122.Flavor Text: Equipped with the newest lightweight hermetic alloy.

123.Name: AT-N Bruiser
123.Flavor Text: Heavily fortified and ready for battle.

125.Name: T15 Jameson Hauler
125.Flavor Text: Delivering cutting-edge tech to our forces.

126.Name: AS34 Wave
126.* Attributes: Sub forces in your legion are not affected by seek.
126.Flavor Text: Just let them try to find us...

127.Name: ATS Minnow
127.Flavor Text: Let's teach them not to underestimate us.

129.Name: Tactical Nuke
129.Flavor Text: Enough negotiation. It's time to escalate.

130.Name: Orbital Barrage
130.* Attributes: 4 specific enemy territories each take 170 damage. You can't attack this turn.

131.Name: MSK Nerve Agent
131.* Attributes: Discard the top 13 cards of a specific enemy arsenal.
131.Flavor Text: This will change the face of the war.

132.Name: Dirty Bomb
132.* Attributes: A specific enemy territory takes 90 damage and can't produce on its next turn.

133.Name: Hydrosonic Blast
133.* Attributes: Eliminate all navy forces without armored in a specific enemy legion.
133.Flavor Text: The blast will shear through most hull plating.

134.Name: HLK Neutron Detonation
134.* Attributes: Eliminate a specific enemy territory; its owner discards all but 4 cards.

135.Name: Toxic Devastation
135.* Attributes: A specific enemy food territory can't produce on its next turn.
135.Flavor Text: They can't wage war if they've nothing left to eat.

136.Name: Inescapable Infection
136.* Attributes: Attach this to a specific territory.

137.Name: Chemical Augmentation
137.* Attributes: You can only play 1 instance of this per turn.
137.Flavor Text: This will make you faster and stronger, for a time.

138.Name: Ion Particle Strike
138.* Attributes: A specific enemy territory takes 90 damage.

139.Name: M42 Flatback
139.* Attributes: You can pay chopper force fuel resource costs using any resource.

140.Name: Antimatter Bomb
140.Flavor Text: Magnetic containment is stable; prepare for drop.

141.Name: System Blackout
141.* Attributes: 2 specific enemy territories each take 50 damage. Their owner can't gain intel from intel cards on their next turn.
141.Flavor Text: They'll be too occupied restoring comms to focus on us.

142.Name: ZN Blood Fungus
142.* Attributes: Attach this to a specific non-drone soldier force.
142.Flavor Text: This is a highly contagious, rapid-growth fungus...

143.Name: Mauz Gas
143.* Attributes: Each player discards the top 3 cards of their arsenal. Soldier forces can't attack or block until your next turn.
143.Flavor Text: The effects are instant, but the gas can linger.

144.Name: Nano Corrosive Attack
144.* Attributes: Attach this to a specific enemy force and eliminate its other attachments; it loses armored.

145.Name: Radioactive Fallout
145.* Attributes: Each player loses 1 morale and eliminates all but 3 forces they control. Discard weather in the war zone.
145.Flavor Text: Disaster drifts on a fell wind.

146.Name: Noxious Burst
146.Flavor Text: They're firing chemicals! Masks on, everyone!

147.Name: Agent Margot, Assassin
147.Flavor Text: You won't see her, but you're in her sights.

148.Name: The Hawk's Nest
148.Flavor Text: Our new facility is a hive of wingman activity.

149.Name: Denson Factory
149.* Attributes: When a tank force is ready in your legion, find a tank force in your arsenal, show it, and put it in your hand. Shuffle your arsenal. You can pay tank force fuel resource costs using any resource.
149.Flavor Text: Optimizing assembly has increased output capability...

150.Name: Draft Center
150.Flavor Text: Soldiers, that's what we need in this difficult time.

151.Name: State Media Building
151.* Attributes: You can't lose morale from other eliminated buildings.
151.Flavor Text: We well help the people think what they should...

152.Name: Dietrich Genetic Labs
152.* Attributes: Only 1 instance of this per legion.
152.Flavor Text: Their bodies will fuel the next breakthrough...

153.Name: Medical Release
153.Flavor Text: Take rest and heal up. Your fight isn't over.

154.Name: Plasma Firewall
154.* Attributes: Attach this to a specific building or territory with no other attachments; forces that hit it, hit this instead.
154.Flavor Text: On-demand barrier systems for fragile centers.

155.Name: Hydro Crypto Generator
155.Flavor Text: Clean energy coupled with digital income.

156.Name: Cyberwarfare Hub
156.Flavor Text: Our hackers will keep them busy.

159.Name: Submerged Sub Base
159.Flavor Text: The enemy is busy searching everywhere but here.

160.Name: Thunderbird ICBM
160.Flavor Text: These missiles are expensive but unstoppable.

161.Name: Ghost Training Facility
161.* Attributes: Forces with ghost in your legion are not affected by enemy WMD.
161.Flavor Text: You will learn to withstand anything, or you will die.

162.Name: Glasport Radar Facility
162.Flavor Text: They thought they could hide from us...

163.Name: Structural Disruptor
163.Flavor Text: Weaken the core structure and it will fall.

166.Name: Black Market
166.* Attributes: You can pay force and WMD resource costs using any resource if you control a supplier force in your legion.

167.Name: 205X Prototype
167.Flavor Text: How can they fight what they can't see?

169.Name: XR73 Crocodile
169.Flavor Text: Agility and armor fused by engineering.

171.Name: Black Nebula III
171.Flavor Text: We'll strike from inside their air space.

172.Name: VR Aspirant
172.Flavor Text: Programmed to listen with the sharpest sensors.

173.Name: Overtax
173.* Attributes: You can't play this on your first turn. You can only play 1 instance of this per turn.
173.Flavor Text: A tax increase on all goods will take effect immediately.

174.Name: Motion of Annexation
174.Pick 1: An enemy accepts this treaty after you specify a territory in their legion; they gain 4 morale and 6 generic; take control of it. You can't attack this turn.
174.Pick 2: An enemy declines this treaty after you specify a territory in their legion; they lose 4 morale.

175.Name: Induced Inflation
175.* Attributes: A specific enemy can't pay non-morale resource costs using generic resources on their next turn; they lose 1 morale.
175.Flavor Text: See what fear and doubt can do to the markets...

176.Name: Prebattle Prayer
176.* Attributes: You can only play 1 instance of this per turn.
176.Flavor Text: Let us not fear, for we're not alone...

177.Name: All Hands
177.* Attributes: Decrease 2 specific non-leader timers in your legion by 1.
177.Flavor Text: I know you're all tired, but I need to ask more from you.

178.Name: Climbing Death Toll
178.* Attributes: Eliminate up to 3 infected soldier forces in a specific enemy legion. If you do, they lose 1 morale for each.
178.Flavor Text: I doubt they'll find peace, even in rest...

180.Name: Nuclear Arms Race
180.Attributes: MORALE(+1), ENEMY_MORALE(-1), DEPLOY(1, NUCLEAR, nuclear WMD)

181.Name: Ignite the Confidence
181.Attributes: MORALE_CONDITION(>, 25, Forces in your legion gain 10 health.), MORALE_CONDITION(>, 35, Forces in your legion gain 10 attack.), MORALE_CONDITION(>, 40, Forces in your legion return after battle.)
181.* Attributes: Attach this to a specific leader.

182.Name: Shore Leave
182.* Attributes: Increase a specific cost timer in your legion by 1. If you do, gain 2 morale.
182.Flavor Text: Rest up and be ready to fight when you come back.

183.Name: Medal of Valor
183.* Attributes: Attach this to a specific non-drone soldier force in your legion. If you do, gain 2 morale. If this is eliminated, lose 1 morale.
183.Flavor Text: Your bravery in combat has not gone unnoticed.

184.Name: Back to the Fray
184.* Attributes: You can only play 1 instance of this per turn.
184.Flavor Text: I'm getting back in this fight!

185.Name: Rush Job
185.* Attributes: Decrease a specific non-leader ability timer in your legion by 1.
185.Flavor Text: The details don't matter; just get it done!

186.Name: Crossed Lines
186.* Attributes: Eliminate a non-drone soldier force in your legion. If you do, find a WMD in your arsenal, show it, and put it in your hand. Shuffle your arsenal. You can only play 1 instance of this per turn.
186.Flavor Text: Discard your morality, and free yourself from guilt...

187.Name: Ready Response
187.* Attributes: A specific force in your legion with a turn cost <2 returns after battle this turn.
187.Flavor Text: Prep a team of your finest. I have a mission for them.

188.Name: Fear of the Unknown
188.* Attributes: If there are > 3 spy forces in your legion and > 3 intel cards in your discard, a specific enemy loses 3 morale.
188.Flavor Text: At the edge of darkness, will they have the courage?

189.Name: State Reinforcement
189.* Attributes: Attach this to a specific building or territory in your legion; it gains 30 health; it's not affected by demo and weather.
189.Flavor Text: Critical infrastructure must be hardened against attack!

190.Name: Rationed Resources
190.* Attributes: Increase a specific required timer in your legion by 1.
190.Flavor Text: One at a time! Everyone gets their share eventually!

191.Name: Reunite
191.* Attributes: Take control of a specific force you own, without stealth and a turn cost <2.

192.Name: Avalon Academy
192.* Attributes: You can pay morale food resource costs using any resource.
192.Flavor Text: We train the finest minds to think strategically.

193.Name: Private Reza Naveed
193.Flavor Text: The tip of the spear, destined to shatter.

194.Name: Letters from Home
194.Flavor Text: We fight to ensure we still have homes to write back to.

195.Name: Resource Silo
195.Flavor Text: We've built stockpiles in various locations...

197.Name: NCS Department
197.* Attributes: You can't be affected by surveil. Enemies can't cause you to discard from your hand.
197.Flavor Text: The national hub of our counterintelligence strategy.

198.Name: Suit X
198.* Attributes: Attach this to a specific non-drone, non-dog soldier force in your legion; it gains 30 health; it's not affected by dead man, pick-off, final say, and enemy WMD.
198.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY

199.Name: Calculated Interference
199.* Attributes: Increase a specific enemy non-leader, non-territory timer by 1.
199.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
199.Flavor Text: They need a little…change of pace.

200.Name: Renewal Program
200.* Attributes: Find up to 4 specific non-soldier forces in your discard; show them; put 1 in your hand; shuffle the rest into your arsenal.
200.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
200.Flavor Text: What else can we scrape together?

201.Name: Propaganda
201.Flavor Text: We have to spread the word...

202.Name: Restored Beast
202.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
202.Flavor Text: Not much to look at, but it'll hit just as hard.

203.Name: Instilling Fear
203.* Attributes: A specific enemy's non-drone forces can't block during the next battle.
203.Flavor Text: Their resolve will be broken like the bodies on display.

204.Name: Insidious Root Code
204.* Attributes: Eliminate a specific attached intel. If you have the most intel, eliminate each attached intel in a specific enemy legion.
204.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
204.Flavor Text: The hack is waiting to be triggered.

205.Name: Decoded Signal
205.* Attributes: Enemy legions lose stealth this turn. If you have more intel than a specific enemy, their legion loses covert this turn.
205.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY

206.Name: Skycrane Restoration
206.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
206.Flavor Text: Repairs complete. Frontline bound. Let's roll.

207.Name: X10 Logistics
207.* Attributes: Find up to 3 specific cards with a cost timer > 0 in your discard and shuffle them into your arsenal. Draw a card.
207.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY

208.Name: Operational Selection
208.* Attributes: Draw 4 cards. Shuffle 2 cards from your hand into your arsenal.
208.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
208.Flavor Text: Let's focus on the most necessary items.

209.Name: A.I. Analysis
209.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
209.Flavor Text: Let's see what patterns it picked up.

210.Name: Thermite Grenade
210.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
210.Flavor Text: Send them out with a bang.

211.Name: Denial of Service
211.* Attributes: Discard the top 2 cards of a specific enemy arsenal.
211.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY

212.Name: Refinery Shutdown
212.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY

213.Name: Supply Line Breakdown
213.* Attributes: Discard a card. If you do, a specific enemy discards a card.
213.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY

214.Name: Advanced Drafting
214.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
214.Flavor Text: A.I. assisted drafting is the next level of design.

216.Name: Structural Reclamation
216.* Attributes: Find a specific discarded building with a turn cost < 2, show it, and put it with your legion.
216.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
216.Flavor Text: It looks worse than it is. We'll get to work right away.

217.Name: Dynamic Speed System
217.* Attributes: Attach this to a specific non-soldier force in your legion; it's not affected by enemy WMD.
217.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
217.Flavor Text: Sir, after installation, we'll be fully prepared.

218.Name: DX-C
218.Flavor Text: It can get in and plant the explosives...

219.Name: Drone Surveillance
219.* Attributes: You can only play this if you control a drone force in your legion.
219.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
219.Flavor Text: The feed is coming online now, sir.

220.Name: Weatherize
220.* Attributes: Attach this to a specific non-soldier card in your legion; it's not affected by weather.
220.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
220.Flavor Text: The forecast doesn't look good, but we'll ride it out.

221.Name: Armor Upgrade
221.* Attributes: Attach this to a specific card in your legion. It's not affected by dead man, final say, pick-off, and ended. You can put this with your legion if it's in your opening hand.
221.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY

222.Name: Private Wolfric Hoffman
222.* Attributes: Infected soldier forces in your legion can't produce.
222.Flavor Text: Specimen 222 exhibits rapid nervous system failure.

223.Name: H5 Drop Ship
223.Flavor Text: Doors are open; you're clear for drop!

224.Name: Detachment
224.* Attributes: Eliminate a specific card attached to another card.
224.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY

225.Name: Ailing Soldier
225.Flavor Text: Specimen 225 shows lack of autonomy; keep observing.

226.Name: Depleted Uranium Rounds
226.* Attributes: Attach this to a specific basic, sniper, or heavy soldier force in your legion; it gains 20 attack; forces it specifies or battles lose armored until the next turn.
226.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
226.Flavor Text: Engineered to punch through hardened exteriors.

227.Name: Tracer Rounds
227.* Attributes: Attach this to a specific force in your legion; forces it specifies or battles lose evade until the next turn.
227.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY

228.Name: For the Cause
228.* Attributes: Eliminate a soldier force in your legion. If you do, find 2 unique intel or morale cards in your arsenal, show them, and put them in your hand. Shuffle your arsenal.
228.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
228.Flavor Text: I will do whatever is required of me.

229.Name: Exploited Design Flaw
229.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
229.Flavor Text: They never noticed the flaw in their design.

230.Name: Private William Stein
230.* Attributes: Eliminate a specific unspent resource in your legion.
230.Flavor Text: Testing of specimen 230 has proven costly.

233.Name: Abdul Hafiz, the Supplier
233.Flavor Text: I can get you what you need, but it's going to cost.

235.Name: Tranquil Sunlight
235.Flavor Text: Peace can be found in the briefest of moments.

236.Name: Monsoon Storm
236.Flavor Text: The waters are rising! We have to turn back!

237.Name: Shattered Ground
237.* Attributes: Each building takes 20 damage. Soldier and army forces can't attack or block.
237.Flavor Text: The buildings are coming down! Run!

238.Name: Volcanic Eruption
238.* Attributes: Each territory takes 20 damage. Legions lose stealth and seek.

239.Name: Storm Surge
239.* Attributes: Each player flips a building facedown and adds a cost timer of 1; they're not ready.
239.Flavor Text: The seawalls couldn't hold it back...

240.Name: Hard Freeze
240.* Attributes: Each food territory takes 20 damage and can't produce.
240.Flavor Text: Our stores are safe, but the fields may not recover.

241.Name: Air Pollution
241.* Attributes: Each player loses 1 morale. Non-drone soldier forces can't attack or block. Forces lose anti-ground.
241.Flavor Text: We've seen in increase in respiratory complications...

242.Name: Geomagnetic Disturbance
242.* Attributes: Forces with a power resource cost can't attack or block.
242.Flavor Text: Solar activity is disrupting electronics in the war zone.

243.Name: Tropical Cyclone
243.* Attributes: Air and non-sub navy forces can't attack or block.
243.Flavor Text: It's preventing our forces from going on the offensive.

300.Name: Underworld
300.* Attributes: If this is exalted, draw cards you affect with unveil.
300.Flavor Text: Factions within factions, pawns among pawns…

302.Name: De la Croix
302.Flavor Text: The pace is different in these back waters.

303.Name: Akamu
303.Flavor Text: His people call him the Charismatic Fist.

305.Name: Sawyer
305.Flavor Text: What hasn't killed him has strengthened his resolve.

306.Name: Auren
306.Flavor Text: I'm confident you'll see things my way.

307.Name: Ryker
307.* Attributes: You can pay WMD generic resource costs using half as many, rounded up. If you do, lose 1 morale.
307.Flavor Text: I've already won the arms race...

308.Name: High Justice
308.* Attributes: You can pay non-soldier force generic resource costs using 1 less.
308.Flavor Text: She takes the mantle with a solemn heart.

309.Name: Holt
309.Flavor Text: War is won on the back of logistics.

310.Name: Ronin
310.Flavor Text: I have broken from my father's draconian ideals.

311.Name: Demidov

500.Name: Dimitrovtek-11 Mech
500.Flavor Text: All it leaves behind is fire and pain.

501.Name: Goliath 62D
501.Flavor Text: The Goliath moves, the ground quakes...

502.Name: Dark Bear - 2XP
502.Flavor Text: It claws through enemies with ease.

503.Name: GR Giga Crawler
503.Attributes: ATTACK(30, artillery forces), ARMORED, ARTILLERY, BLITZ

504.Name: A96 Knight Hunter
504.* Attributes: Cards that block this lose anti-air this turn.

508.Name: VX Cerberus
508.Attributes: ARMORED, STEALTH, ATTACH(3, WINGMAN, wingman forces)
508.Flavor Text: A monster with several sets of sharp teeth.

509.Name: HX Odin
509.Flavor Text: The father of all amphibious assault craft.

510.Name: 0X-P Glacier
510.Flavor Text: A new tide has rolled in.

511.Name: 205X Prototype
511.Flavor Text: How can they fight what they can't see?

600.Name: VL II Energy Center
600.Flavor Text: Our battery technology is shockingly advanced.

601.Name: Ironhead Enclave
601.Flavor Text: Forging the backbone of the nation.

602.Name: North Oakworth
602.Attributes: MORALE(+1), HEALTH(+10 To each blocking force in your legion)
602.Flavor Text: They thought we'd roll over...they were wrong.

603.Name: Solarin Grove
603.Flavor Text: Clean energy, in pursuit of a clear future.

604.Name: Blackearth Mine
604.Flavor Text: We'll extract it at any cost!

605.Name: Moreau Swamp
605.Flavor Text: The swamp provides, if you know where to look...

606.Name: Scrap Yard S3-1035
606.* Attributes: Produce 2 extra resources if you have > 4 non-soldier forces in your discard.
606.Flavor Text: Strip it down and ship it out!

607.Name: Warehouse Precinct
607.* Attributes: You may attach unspent resources to this; enemies can't specify them.

610.Name: Petrochemical Works
610.* Attributes: If this produces hollow, find a specific card in your arsenal and place it on top after you shuffle your arsenal.
610.Flavor Text: Anything raw or crude, we'll refine it.

611.Name: Bio Incineration Facilities
611.Flavor Text: Ashes to ashes, dust to fertilizer...

613.Name: Hart Natural Gas Center
613.* Attributes: If eliminated, your territories each take 50 damage.

614.Name: Sola Island Markets
614.* Attributes: Draw a card if this produces generic.
614.Flavor Text: You'd be surprised what could turn up.

615.Name: Nation's Capital
615.Flavor Text: From here, ripples of power spread...

616.Name: Abandoned Wasteland
616.* Attributes: Forces that attack this can't return on their next turn.

617.Name: Clementine Mire
617.Flavor Text: Black gold from the black depths.

618.Name: Koloa Plantation
618.Flavor Text: Koloa bananas, known the world over.

619.Name: White Rock Energy
619.Flavor Text: From primary energy straight to the nation's grid.

620.Name: Weapons District
620.Flavor Text: If you've got a taste for destruction, we'll satisfy it.

621.Name: International Pipelines
621.Flavor Text: From Dryton, to all points on the map.

622.Name: Brotherland Fields
622.Flavor Text: A hidden bounty known only to the initiated.
